failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT token has metadata access (HTTP 200 on /repos endpoint) but lacks Contents permission — /repos/RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova/contents/ returns 403 'Resource not accessible by personal access token'. git clone via HTTPS returns 403 'Write access to repository not granted'. GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 32): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 32 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-20). Root cause confirmed: GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT is a fine-grained PAT without 'Contents' repository permission for RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova. Fix: add Contents (read) permission to GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT for iNova, OR add RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova as a session source repo in environment config.
